When you are asked to implement a new UI feature or to test an existing one, always provide screenshots of new features.
For this: 
1. Start the frontend locally.
2. Open the feature page with Playwright.
3. Capture a screenshot.
4. Attach the screenshot to the pull request description.

When you create a pull request for a new UI feature, make sure to attach the relevant screenshots from docs/screenshots to the pull request description.
You can refer to the screenshot images in the pull request by using the following markdown syntax:

```markdown
![Feature Preview](docs/screenshots/[feature]-preview.png)
```
